title: Cozy Gooey Syrian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring mixed grains sauteed in garlic sauce for a cozy, nut-free-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Use minced garlic for easier preparation.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Stir in finely chopped onion and cook for another minute.
Pour tomato sauce into the skillet with mixed grains, adding salt and pepper to taste. Stir well to combine.
Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, allowing flavors to meld together.
Add vegetable broth or water and stir until fully incorporated. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for an additional 15-20 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Serve warm as a main course or side dish.
